rationale: Parameter table covers all query options (tags include/exclude, type, isDeleted, subChannelId, threadId) with types and descriptions; return type (LiveCollection) documented; error cases for invalid subChannelId noted — missing: what happens when both includingTags and excludingTags conflict.
suggestions: Document the behavior when includingTags and excludingTags have overlapping values — does the SDK throw, filter to empty, or favor one set?
Add a note on the maximum number of tags that can be specified per filter.
